jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Vedanta
jsonLd.description:
Vedanta is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Vedanta:
Vedanta is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedanta!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
